rules.source: soraraw.net#$##__next > div[style] { filter: none !important; pointer-events: auto !important; user-select: auto !important; }
mangaruu.com#$##__next > div[style*="filter:"] { filter: none !important; pointer-events: auto !important; user-select: auto !important; }
tokyo-sports.co.jp#$#body.tp-modal-open { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; touch-action: auto !important; }
tokyo-sports.co.jp#$#html.tp-scroll-prevented { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; touch-action: auto !important; }
guitarmagazine.jp#$#body.tp-modal-open { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; touch-action: auto !important; }
guitarmagazine.jp#$#html.tp-scroll-prevented { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; touch-action: auto !important; }
jprime.jp#$#.image-area { opacity: 1 !important; pointer-events: auto !imortant; filter: none !important; }
jprime.jp#$#.js-article-wrap .article-body { opacity: 1 !important; pointer-events: auto !imortant; filter: none !important; }
snrec.jp#$#body.tp-modal-open { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; touch-action: auto !important; }
snrec.jp#$#html.tp-scroll-prevented { overflow: visible !important; height: auto !important; touch-action: auto !important; }
